Tearfully pleading with the
mayor to help her to secure dol
lar which had been unjustly with
held from her since last June by
the Reliable Employment Agency,
9177 IL Sprague avenue. Mrs. Ran
dali, a woman OF about As years,
was granted her request and told
that 1t was the policy Of the city to
guard against entertainments of
various employment offices in this
city.


Mrs. Randall, with her baby hoy,
talked to the mayor for a while,
and she was told that she was en-
titled to the dollar. She said that
she had gone to Mrs. Heating. man.
ager of the Reliable Agency. last
June, paid dollar and been given
a ticket to go to a house on Lee
street, where she expected to get
a position as a housekeeper. She
went there at once, but found the
